deviations.what: The original drives the footer toolbar button visibility from a separate 'range' media JSON model ({range>/isNoPhone}, isNotPhoneOrTablet, isTablet, isPhoneOrTablet). abap2UI5 has one default model, so the flags live flat in it and visible binds them directly - the 'range>' prefix is dropped; the last path segment is identical, which structural-diff matches. Values use the desktop media ranges (the original filled them from Device.media - a client-only decision). Button presses show client toasts (original onPress/onOpen).
